3276130.name: Tiny Robots: Portal Escape Demo
3276130.description: Slip into the metal shoes of a young, smart robot named Robort. One day, as you are walking to your grandpa’s house, you witness his kidnapping. His garage is left thrashed, his inventions are broken, and all you have is a radio station connecting you to Grandpa. Who did this? What do they want? You must solve this mystery full of brain-scratching riddles, powerful enemies, and unusual worlds.
